interventions.name: N5 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: threat-model templates that require assets, attacker goals, and likely vulnerabilities to be named explicitly

interventions.name: N5 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: mechanism-to-risk mapping tasks pairing bounded attacks with defenses and explanations

interventions.name: N5 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: security tradeoff prompts that compare protection gains with one cost in usability, performance, or maintenance

interventions.name: N5 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: paired security analyses using the same threat-model structure in a second system context
